name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ White flower butterfly 5-grid embroidery ✨
This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Embroidered throughout with Pietro Ruffo's design, it highlights the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.
Model: D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm, 📸 Exclusive real-life photos 🎞✨ with original packaging gift box 🎁]
